targets.query:
from(bucket: "temperature")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading" and r._field == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.room, set: ["living room", "office", "our bedroom", "Owen bedroom"]))
  |> drop(columns: ["location"])

from(bucket: "temperature")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading" and r._field == "humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.room, set: ["living room", "office", "our bedroom", "Owen bedroom"]))
  |> drop(columns: ["location"])

from(bucket: "temperature")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading" and r._field == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room == "living room")
  |> last()
  |> drop(columns: ["location"])
